models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String)
    credit_limit = Column(Numeric)
    balance = Column(Numeric)
models.description: Table for customers with credit limit and balance.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    amount_total = Column(Numeric)
    notes = Column(String)

    # Relationship
    customer = relationship('Customer', backref='orders')
models.description: Table for orders related to customers with shipping details.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Numeric)
    unit_price = Column(Numeric)
    amount = Column(Numeric)

    # Relationships
    order = relationship('Order', backref='items')
    product = relationship('Product', backref='items')
models.description: Table for items in an order with price and quantity details.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String)
    unit_price = Column(Numeric)
models.name: Product

rules.name: Customer Balance Check
rules.description: Ensures customer's balance does not exceed credit limit.
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit, error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: Customer Balance Sum
rules.description: Balances are summed from all pending order amounts.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Order Amount Total Calculation
rules.description: Derives the total order amount from individual item amounts.

rules.name: Item Amount Calculation
rules.description: Calculates item amount using quantity and unit price.

rules.name: Unit Price Copy Rule
rules.description: Copies unit price from product to order item.

rules.name: Order Kafka Dispatch
rules.description: Send order to Kafka if it is shipped.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})

test_data: Inserting data for Customer, Order, Item, and Product models.

name: CustomerOrderSystem
